title: glechoma rotundifolia
intro: Glechoma rotundifolia, also known as Creeping Thyme, is a low-growing, spreading perennial plant native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and respiratory problems, due to its antiseptic and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Glechoma rotundifolia include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs and colds, and aiding digestion. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
